summary: Completed testing of Pinnacle user (Megha Sharma) functionality. Backend: 10/10 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features verified - Megha can login via test-login, see her bookings in coaching page, unlimited sessions displayed correctly, can book additional sessions without purchasing add-ons.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed mock login duplicate key error in auth.py - now checks by email first before inserting new user
CoachingPage.jsx correctly displays '∞ Unlimited sessions' for Pinnacle users
TestLogin.jsx correctly shows 'Megha Sharma' with 'Pinnacle' plan and 'Unlimited coaching sessions' description
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/auth.py - Fixed mock login to handle existing users by email (lines 2149-2178)
/app/backend/tests/test_pinnacle_user.py - Created test suite for Pinnacle user functionality
seed_data_creation: Test booking created for Megha with date 2026-04-10 at 10:00 with mentor Aparajita Subramanian
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pinnacle user (Megha Sharma) functionality fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Login via /test-login works, 2) Dashboard shows Pinnacle badge and 179 days left, 3) Strategy Call shows 'Unlimited', 4) Coaching page shows '∞ Unlimited sessions', 5) My Sessions tab shows upcoming booking with Aparajita Subramanian on Apr 10, 6) Past session shows 'both no show' status, 7) Book Now buttons available for booking additional sessions.

pinnacle_login.description: Megha can log in via test-login page
pinnacle_login.evidence: Mock login returns user with plan='pinnacle', coaching_sessions_total=-1

pinnacle_badge_display.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Pinnacle' badge next to user name

unlimited_sessions_display.evidence: Coaching page shows '∞ Unlimited sessions' in header

booking_visibility.description: Megha can see her booking in coaching page
booking_visibility.evidence: My Sessions tab shows booking with Aparajita Subramanian on Fri, 10 Apr at 10:00

session_details.description: Session details display correctly with mentor info
session_details.evidence: Booking shows mentor name, date, time, Join/Reschedule/Cancel buttons

book_additional_sessions.description: Pinnacle user can book additional sessions without purchasing add-ons
book_additional_sessions.evidence: Book Session tab shows mentors with 'Book Now' buttons, no purchase prompts

bug_fix_applied.issue: Mock login failing with DuplicateKeyError for Pinnacle user
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Mock login checked for existing user by ID but database has unique index on email. Megha's user already existed with different ID.
bug_fix_applied.fix: Updated mock login to check by email first, then by ID, and update existing user instead of inserting new one
